title: Tariff rate for some nations will rise to 15 percent: Trade representative
fullText: U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer on Wednesday said some nations will face a 15 percent tariff or higher as President Trump looks to rewire trade policy in the wake of a Supreme Court ruling that struck down most of his sweeping tariffs. “Right now, we have the 10 percent tariff. It’ll go up to 15 percent…

It’ll go up to 15 percent…
